scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace backend & npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm test --workspace backend && npm test --workspace frontend
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --workspace backend && npm run coverage --workspace frontend
scripts.test:load: npm run test:load --workspace backend && npm run test:load --workspace frontend
scripts.test:mutation: npm run test:mutation --workspace backend && npm run test:mutation --workspace frontend
